title: Add task-spec loading contract
goal: Load and validate one bounded task spec from a target project's .swarm/tasks directory.
scope: Add one loader that resolves a task file from a task id or an explicit path.
Validate required fields and optional fields with explicit messages.
Return structured text and JSON results.
non_goals: Do not derive execution policy automatically.
required_outputs: Unit test coverage for valid and invalid task specs.
success_criteria: A valid task spec loads successfully.
Missing or malformed task specs fail with inspectable errors.
JSON output returns the normalized task object on success.
notes: Keep the schema small and inspectable.
